title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT DO WE DO, Luffy! We're getting trapped!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! Get dogtooth off the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll manage getting her out to sea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Got it! He came here through the mirror, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not to take you by surprise or anything, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: luffy and his friends might well be

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ones our people and the Kozuki clan have been waiting for for the past several hundred years....although

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ones that will lead this world unto a new dawn!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, Mont D'Or. Surround the coast with battleships.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This ship can fly a whole kilometer!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we try to set sail normally, big mom

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Maaaaa Mamama! So there it is, huh?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
